description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure holding a child, both rendered in a rustic, carved wood style. The adult figure has long, flowing hair and a serene expression, with one arm extended forward and the other cradling the child close to their chest. The child is nestled securely in the adult's arm, looking outward. The surface of the sculpture is textured with visible wood grain and chisel marks, giving it a natural, handcrafted appearance. The back of the sculpture features the long, detailed hair of the adult figure cascading down to the base. The overall form is solid and monolithic, with a roughly cylindrical base.
description: A rustic wooden sculpture of a robed adult holding a child, featuring detailed hair and textured wood grain.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the adult figure's face, extended arm, and the child held closely.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of both figures and the depth of the carved robes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long, flowing hair of the adult figure and the solid, textured back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the adult's face in profile and the child nestled in the arm.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
